name: Textio
tagline: AI writing platform that removes bias from job posts and HR communications
description: Textio uses advanced natural language processing to analyze and improve job listings, performance reviews, and other HR communications. Its AI detects biased or exclusionary language in real-time and suggests inclusive alternatives, helping companies attract more diverse candidate pools. Textio's predictive engine is trained on millions of real hiring outcomes to identify which language patterns drive better results.
features: Real-time bias detection in job posts
pros: Proven to increase diverse applicant pools
cons: Requires volume of data for best insights
